ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "avg_salary" REAL /* Average salary for jobs in the state */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Average hourly rate for jobs in the state */,
  "job_count" INTEGER /* Total count of jobs available in the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the job is located */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary offered for the job position */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly wage for the job position */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level required for the job (e.g., entry, mid, senior) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company offering the job */,
  "location_city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., active, filled) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, HR, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state data being accessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (device and browser information) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job associated with the salary */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the salary applies */,
  "avg_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the job title in the state */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Average hourly rate for the job title in the state */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the job title in the state */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the job title in the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary trend record */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job associated with the trend */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the salary data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the salary data */,
  "avg_salary" REAL /* Average salary for that year and month */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for that year and month */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for that year and month */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_trends_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison record */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being compared */,
  "state_id_1" INTEGER /* First state in the comparison */,
  "state_id_2" INTEGER /* Second state in the comparison */,
  "salary_diff" REAL /* Difference in average salary between the two states */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the comparison */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the comparison */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_comparisons_state_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("state_id_2") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_comparisons_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_comparisons_state_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("state_id_1") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data (e.g., Census Bureau, Bureau of Labor Statistics) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data in JSON format */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
